verse.verse_3: Kitābun fuṣṣilat āyātuhū qur'ānan ‘arabiyyal liqaumiy ya‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_4: Basyīraw wa nażīrā(n), fa'a‘raḍa akṡaruhum fahum lā yasma‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_5: Wa qālū qulūbunā fī akinnatim mimmā tad‘ūnā ilaihi wa fī āżāninā waqruw wa mim baininā wa bainika ḥijābun fa‘mal  innanā ‘āmilūn(a).
verse.verse_6: Qul innamā ana basyarum miṡlukum yūḥā ilayya annamā ilāhukum ilāhuw wāḥidun fastaqīmū ilaihi wastagfirūh(u), wa wailul lil-musyrikīn(a).
verse.verse_7: Allażīna lā yu'tūnaz-zakāta wa hum bil-ākhirati hum kāfirūn(a).
verse.verse_8: Innal-lażīna āmanū wa ‘amiluṣ-ṣāliḥāti lahum ajrun gairu mamnūn(in).
verse.verse_9: Qul a'innakum latakfurūna bil-lażī khalaqal-arḍa fī yaumaini wa taj‘alūna lahū andādā(n), żālika rabbul-‘ālamīn(a).
verse.verse_10: Wa ja‘ala fīhā rawāsiya min fauqihā wa bāraka fīhā wa qaddara fīhā aqwātahā fī arba‘ati ayyām(in), sawā'al lis-sā'ilīn(a).
verse.verse_11: Ṡummastawā ilas-samā'i wa hiya dukhānun faqāla lahā wa lil-arḍi'tiyā ṭau‘an au karhā(n), qālatā atainā ṭā'i‘īn(a).
verse.verse_12: Fa qaḍāhunna sab‘a samāwātin fī yaumaini wa auḥā fī kulli samā'in amrahā, wa zayyannas-samā'ad-dun-yā bimaṣābīḥa wa ḥifẓā(n), żālika taqdīrul-‘azīzil-‘alīm(i).
verse.verse_13: Fa in a‘raḍū faqul anżartukum ṣā‘iqatam miṡla ṣā‘iqati ‘ādiw wa ṡamūd(a).
verse.verse_14: Iż jā'athumur-rusulu mim baini aidīhim wa min khalfihim allā ta‘budū illallāh(a), qālū lau syā'a rabbunā la'anzala malā'ikatan fa'innā bimā ursiltum bihī kāfirūn(a).
verse.verse_15: Fa ammā ‘ādun fastakbarū fil-arḍi bigairil-ḥaqqi wa qālū man asyaddu minnā quwwah(tan), awalam yarau annallāhal-lażī khalaqahum huwa asyaddu minhum quwwah(tan), wa kānū bi'āyātinā yajḥadūn(a).
verse.verse_16: Fa arsalnā ‘alaihim rīḥan ṣarṣaran fī ayyāmin naḥisātil linużīqahum-‘ażābal khizyi fil-ḥayātid-dun-yā, wa la‘ażābul-ākhirati akhzā wa hum lā yunṣarūn(a).
verse.verse_17: Wa ammā ṡamūdu fa hadaināhum fastaḥabbul-‘amā ‘alal-hudā fa akhażathum ṣā‘iqatul-‘ażābil-hūni bimā kānū yaksibūn(a).
verse.verse_18: Wa najjainal-lażīna āmanū wa kānū yattaqūn(a).
verse.verse_19: Wa yauma yuḥsyaru a‘dā'ullāhi ilan-nāri fahum yūza‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_20: Ḥattā iżā mā jā'ūhā syahida ‘alaihim sam‘uhum wa abṣāruhum wa julūduhum bimā kānū ya‘malūn(a).
verse.verse_21: Wa qālū lijulūdihim lima syahittum ‘alainā, qālū anṭaqanallāhul-lażī anṭaqa kulla syai'iw wa huwa khalaqakum awwala marrah(tin), wa ilaihi turja‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_22: Wa mā kuntum tastatirūna ay yasyhada ‘alaikum sam‘ukum wa lā abṣārukum wa lā julūdukum wa lākin ẓanantum  annallāha lā ya‘lamu kaṡīram mimmā ta‘malūn(a).
verse.verse_23: Wa żālikum ẓannukumul-lażī ẓanantum birabbikum ardākum fa aṣbaḥtum minal-khāsirīn(a).
verse.verse_24: Fa iy yaṣbirū fan-nāru maṡwal lahum, wa iy yasta‘tibū famā hum minal-mu‘tabīn(a).
verse.verse_25: Wa qayyaḍnā lahum quranā'a fa zayyanū lahum mā baina aidīhim wa mā khalfahum wa ḥaqqa ‘alaihimul-qaulu fī umamin qad khalat min qablihim minal-jinni wal-ins(i), innahum kānū khāsirīn(a).
verse.verse_26: Wa qālal-lażīna kafarū lā tasma‘ū lihāżal-qur'āni walgau fīhi la‘allakum taglibūn(a).
verse.verse_27: Fa lanużīqannal-lażīna kafarū ‘ażāban syadīdā(n), wa lanajziyannahum aswa'al-lażī  kānū ya‘malūn(a).
verse.verse_28: Żālika jazā'u a‘dā'illāhin-nāru lahum fīhā dārul-khuld(i), jazā'am bimā kānū bi'āyātinā yajḥadūn(a).
verse.verse_29: Wa qālal-lażīna kafarū rabbanā arinal-lażaini aḍallānā minal-jinni wal-insi naj‘alhumā taḥta aqdāminā liyakūnā minal-asfalīn(a).
verse.verse_30: Innal-lażīna qālū rabbunallāhu ṡummastaqāmū tatanazzalu ‘alaihimul-malā'ikatu allā takhāfū wa lā taḥzanū wa absyirū bil-jannatil-latī kuntum tū‘adūn(a).
verse.verse_31: Naḥnu auliyā'ukum fil-ḥayātid-dun-yā wa fil-ākhirah(ti), wa lakum fīhā mā tasytahī anfusukum wa lakum fīhā mā tadda‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_33: Wa man aḥsanu qaulam mimman da‘ā ilallāhi wa ‘amila ṣāliḥaw wa qāla innanī minal-muslimīn(a).
verse.verse_34: Wa lā tastawil-ḥasanatu wa las-sayyi'ah(tu), idfa‘ bil-latī hiya aḥsanu fa'iżal-lażī bainaka wa bainahū ‘adāwatun ka'annahū waliyyun ḥamīm(un).
verse.verse_35: Wa mā yulaqqāhā illal-lażīna ṣabarū, wa mā yulaqqāhā illā żū ḥaẓẓin ‘aẓīm(in).
verse.verse_36: Wa immā yanzagannaka minasy-syaiṭāni nazgun fasta‘iż billāh(i), innahū huwas-samī‘ul-‘alīm(u).
verse.verse_37: Wa min āyātihil-lailu wan-nahāru wasy-syamsu wal-qamar(u), lā tasjudū lisy-syamsi wa lā lil-qamari wasjudū lillāhil-lażī khalaqahunna in kuntum iyyāhu ta‘budūn(a).
verse.verse_38: Fa inistakbarū fal-lażīna ‘inda rabbika yusabbiḥūna lahū bil-laili wan-nahāri wa hum lā yas'amūn(a).
verse.verse_39: Wa min āyātihī annaka taral-arḍa khāsyi‘atan fa iżā anzalnā ‘alaihal-mā'ahtazzat wa rabat, innal-lażī aḥyāhā lamuḥyil-mautā, innahū ‘alā kulli syai'in qadīr(un).
verse.verse_40: Innal-lażīna yulḥidūna fī āyātinā lā yakhfauna ‘alainā, afamay yulqā fin-nāri khairun am may ya'tī āminay yaumal-qiyāmah(ti), i‘malū mā syi'tum, innahū bimā ta‘malūna  baṣīr(un).
verse.verse_41: Innal-lażīna kafarū biż-żikri lammā jā'ahum, wa innahū lakitābun ‘azīz(un).
verse.verse_42: Lā ya'tīhil-bāṭilu mim baini yadaihi wa lā min khalfih(ī), tanzīlum min ḥakīmin ḥamīd(in).
verse.verse_43: Mā yuqālu laka illā mā qad qīla lir-rusuli min qablik(a), inna rabbaka lażū magfiratiw wa żū ‘iqābin alīm(in).
verse.verse_44: Wa lau ja‘alnāhu qur'ānan a‘jamiyyal laqālū lau lā fuṣṣilat āyātuh(ū), a'a‘jamiyyuw wa ‘arabiyy(un), qul huwa lil-lażīna āmanū hudaw wa syifā'(un), wal-lażīna lā yu'minūna fī āżānihim waqruw wa huwa ‘alaihim ‘amā(n), ulā'ika yunādauna mim makānim ba‘īd(in).
verse.verse_45: Wa laqad ātainā mūsal-kitāba fakhtulifa fīh(i), wa lau lā kalimatun sabaqat mir rabbika laquḍiya bainahum, wa innahum lafī syakkim minhu murīb(in).
verse.verse_46: Man ‘amila ṣāliḥan fa linafsih(ī), wa man asā'a fa ‘alaihā, wa mā rabbuka biẓallāmil lil-‘abīd(i).
verse.verse_47: Ilaihi yuraddu ‘ilmus-sā‘ah(ti), wa mā takhruju min ṡamarātim min akmāmihā wa mā taḥmilu min unṡā wa lā taḍa‘u illā bi‘ilmih(ī), wa yauma yunādīhim aina syurakā'ī, qālū āżannāka mā minnā min syahīd(in).
verse.verse_48: Wa ḍalla ‘anhum mā kānū yad‘ūna min qablu wa ẓannū mā lahum mim maḥīṣ(in).
verse.verse_49: Lā yas'amul-insānu min du‘ā'il-khair(i), wa im massahusy-syarru fa ya'ūsun qanūṭ(un).
verse.verse_50: Wa la'in ażaqnāhu raḥmatam minnā mim ba‘di ḍarrā'a massathu layaqūlunna hāżā lī, wa mā aẓunnus-sā‘ata qā'imah(tan), wa la'ir ruji‘tu ilā rabbī inna lī ‘indahū lal-ḥusnā, fa lanunabbi'annal-lażīna kafarū bimā ‘amilū, wa lanużīqannahum min ‘ażābin galīẓ(in).
verse.verse_51: Wa iżā an‘amnā ‘alal-insāni a‘raḍa wa na'ā bijānibih(ī), wa iżā massahusy-syarru fażū du‘ā'in ‘arīḍ(in).
verse.verse_52: Qul ara'aitum in kāna min ‘indillāhi ṡumma kafartum bihī man aḍallu mimman huwa fī syiqāqim ba‘īd(in).
verse.verse_53: Sanurīhim āyātinā fil-āfāqi wa fī anfusihim ḥattā yatabayyana lahum annahul-ḥaqq(u), awalam yakfi birabbika  annahū ‘alā kulli syai'in syahīd(un).
verse.verse_54: Alā innahum fī miryatim mil liqā'i rabbihim, alā innahū bikulli syai'im muḥīṭ(un).
